horoscope: Venus moves into your sector of joy and entertainment today, dear Aries, and it's a favorable time for easygoing activities. It's also a fine cycle for enjoying some extra fun and leisure time, as well as attracting the right situations, people, and things into your life. This transit lasts until July 9th, and it's strong for your personal appeal and pleasure. It's a fine time for love, romance, dating, pleasant pastimes, games, and hobbies. You're more likely to make room for these things over the coming three-plus weeks. It's an excellent time to do something creative, physical, or otherwise tension-relieving. You'll be seeking channels through which to express your need for play and reinforcement. A gentle approach in these areas of life is the most successful one at the moment. You are more confident about sharing yourself and your creativity with others. Today, the Moon moves into your communications sector, and it feels lively, encouraging more movement and interaction in your life.

Venus begins its transit of your sector of heart and home today, dear Taurus, where it will visit until July 9th. Making your home or base of operations more comfortable and harmonious can be a satisfying focus in the weeks ahead. Enhancing or repairing relationships with loved ones is favored during this cycle. Also beneficial now are decorating, hosting, entertaining, and family activities. It can be a time for investing in your comfort, home, and safety. You may be playing it safe with new people on a heart level, or you may find love close to home. Today, the Moon exits your sign and moves into your resources sector for a visit of over two days. Practical matters grab your attention, but it's not an ideal time to make solid plans or decisions on this day before a New Moon.

Venus begins its transit of your sector of communications and connections today, dear Gemini. Until July 9th, you'll more thoroughly enjoy learning, studies, personal interests, and contacts. You're also especially attractive in these areas--you're drawing in situations, people, and things to you that improve your daily life. Conversations are helpful and interesting, or news coming in is heartwarming. This transit encourages more enjoyment, rewards, benefits, and opportunities in the areas of life ruled by this house: short trips, transportation, communications, siblings, and learning, to name the main ones. You can experience improved verbal rapport with others and joy in your daily affairs. Today, the Moon moves into your sign, enlivening your mood. There is some tendency to follow a whim. You may crave more interaction with your environment and seek more spontaneity or action.

Venus leaves your sign and enters your resources sector today, dear Cancer, and until July 9th, you'll experience and benefit from a more comfortable pace. It's a time when you might improve your financial situation or enjoy developing your talents and resources. You have a taste for easier, more straightforward pleasures--and even feelings! You have good sense when it comes to seeing value in projects and objects that you may have otherwise overlooked during this cycle. Affections stabilize, and you could be spending more money on beautiful things, comfort items, and things you expect will last. Today, the Moon moves into your solar twelfth house, signaling the near-close of a lunar cycle. As you wind down, you're likely to learn a lot about what's going on inside you. You might gravitate to quiet and/or healing activities.

Venus begins its transit of your sign, dear Leo, and this gentle, sweet cycle will stick with you until July 9th. Personal attraction boosts up in the weeks ahead! You're in an excellent position for magnetizing what and you want into your life. It's a time to attract positive attention and to focus more on affection, love, and pleasure. It's a time for living well and putting the right kind of vibes out into the universe. As well, it can be a period for rewarding yourself for recent efforts. Today, the Moon moves into your social sector for a couple of days, and you're focusing on friendship and cooperation.

Venus moves into your solar twelfth house, dear Virgo, and will be a guest here until July 9th. It signals a time to process and digest recent events, particularly related to your love life, affections, and pleasures. Generally, it's about shedding attitudes that are not working for you, and it feels lighter once you do. Sorting out your feelings is essential now--it's not about burying them but about exploring inner needs and desires. Your affections can be complicated, or relationships can be complex. There can be a greater love of private moments, and you might enjoy a certain measure of solitude, along with benefits and help from behind the scenes. You might do more for others during this period, although there is every reason to take your time with matters of the heart, decisions about love, and money or pleasure. You're moving into a quieter, private period for your social life. Today, the Moon moves to the top of your solar chart, however, getting you into stronger touch with your ambitions and goals.

Venus moves into your social sector today, dear Libra, where it will visit until July 9th. This transit comes as a subtle but welcome boost to friendships, love, and personal appeal. Love, affection, and charm flow more naturally now. Benefits may come through networking, group associations, and new or current friendships in the weeks ahead. Good company may be easier to find. There can be mutual benefits with friends, and a subtle sense that you can be yourself with others and feel at ease. Be gracious with business associates, as this is a good time for making connections. Consider long-term happiness goals during this cycle. Today, with the Moon's move into your spirit sector, you require a change of pace and can fully enjoy the forward-looking energy it brings. However, it's also a day when it's easier than usual to fall into the traps of procrastination.

In the weeks ahead, you'll find it easier to cooperate and charm others, dear Scorpio, particularly in public or professional settings. Venus heads into your solar tenth house of responsibility and reputation today, and responsibilities in love become clearer in the coming weeks, or there can be a pleasant boost to your reputation. You may be cutting deals and negotiating with more ease until July 9th or enjoying increased social and financial opportunities through your business or dealings. People tend to acknowledge and notice your creativity, charm, or warmth. Life seems to showcase your talents more readily during this cycle. Today, the Moon moves into your solar eighth house, and you're ready to pour your attention into something special.

Venus heads into your solar ninth house today, dear Sagittarius, and from now until July 9th, it's moving in harmony with your sign, boosting your appeal and fun. In the weeks ahead, your feelings are easier to express and understand, and when it comes to love, your ideals are set particularly high. You're seeking mental rapport with others. There might also be a pleasurable trip or adventure that takes you out of your routine. This can alternatively happen on a mental or spiritual level as you seek emotional refreshment. You gravitate toward social or romantic situations that make you happy. You're a little bolder with love, pleasure, enjoyment, and tastes. Finding special happiness in learning and doing new things can be a theme during this warm cycle. Sharing your personal philosophy with someone special can elevate a relationship. With the Moon's move into your partnership sector today, the desire to be around people is strong, and people in your life might inspire you to learn and do more.

Venus heads into your solar eighth house today, dear Capricorn, where it will visit until July 9th. This cycle encourages your desire to be close to someone or to spend extra time on a project or venture you love. Focusing your love and energies can be especially attractive and rewarding in the weeks ahead. Coming to peaceful agreements about money is possible, or you may find it easier to attract support. This cycle favors working on the more complex aspects of relationships, sharing, and intimacy. You'll enjoy digging a little deeper into the mysteries of life--or into the dynamics of a relationship--in the weeks ahead. This can be a good cycle for material and/or emotional benefits, particularly through a partner. It's a fine time for bringing an existing relationship to a new level, self-discovery, and enjoyable research.

Venus enters your partnership sector today, dear Aquarius, where it will visit until July 9th. This cycle is a good one for smoothing over differences with others, particularly in one-to-one settings. Pairing up with someone comes more easily and naturally, and seems to bring you benefits and joy. You're more interested in peace and harmony in your relationships at this time. You may attract a warm, helpful person into your life, or partnerships and situations that involve one-on-one contact can thrive at this time. You might enjoy having company more than usual now. Feedback can be most helpful.

Venus enters your sector of work and health today, dear Pisces, where it will visit until July 9th. It's a fine cycle for finding more joy or creating balance in your daily life and routines. Pleasant situations, jobs, or people are in focus as you go about your work or routines. You can be especially thoughtful with the people you care about now, expressing your affection through helpful gestures. You may be bringing more artistry or beauty to your work or work environment now. It can be a good time for attracting suitable or pleasurable work. It's not a showy time for your love life, but it is a good cycle for tending to the more practical side of relationships. Today, there can be mixed signals to decipher. Slow down on this day before a New Moon.
